cost_name: Grid Connection — Greenfield 110-380 kV Substation — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IEA Electricity Grids 2025 report + TSO connection cost data (TenneT, RTE, Amprion). Transformer lead times and substation costs from industry benchmarks. Range reflects distance to grid and voltage level.

confidence.rationale: IEA grid infrastructure cost data with European TSO benchmarks. Wide range reflects site-specific variation (distance to existing HV line, voltage level, terrain).

primary_drivers: Distance to existing HV transmission line
New substation vs. tap-in to existing
Grid reinforcement costs (if allocated to project)
exclusions: Grid reinforcement costs beyond connection point

sources.title: IEA Electricity Grids and Secure Energy Transitions 2025
sources.author: IEA
